title: How I Built an AI Market Summarizer
description: Designing an LLM pipeline for structured market intelligence — from raw news ingestion to actionable briefs using GPT-4 and vector stores.

title: RAG with Hybrid Search: A Practical Guide
description: Combining dense and sparse retrieval to build more accurate AI search systems. A walkthrough of the architecture behind the Magnificent-7 chatbot.

title: Azure Data Engineering Patterns for AI Systems
description: How modern data platforms need to evolve to support LLM-powered applications — pipelines, schemas, and orchestration lessons learned.
